vocab.meaning: người cuồng xe cộ/người đam mê ô tô
vocab.example: I've never been much of a petrol head, so I usually prioritize fuel efficiency over engine power when choosing a car.

vocab.meaning: các tính năng phụ trợ hiện đại và hào nhoáng
vocab.example: I’m a fan of modern electric vehicles that come with all the latest bells and whistles, like touch-screen consoles and autopilot.
I’d love a luxury sedan, but since I don't want to break the bank, a reliable second-hand hatchback is more my style.

vocab.meaning: được thiết kế để sử dụng bền lâu
vocab.example: I gravitate towards German engineering because their cars feel like they are built to last a lifetime.

vocab.meaning: sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa hai ưu điểm khác nhau
vocab.example: A hybrid SUV offers the best of both worlds: the spaciousness of a family car and the eco-friendliness of an electric motor.

vocab.meaning: sang trọng một cách tinh tế, không phô trương
vocab.example: I prefer cars that are classy and understated rather than those flashy sports cars that scream for attention.

vocab.meaning: chạy cực nhanh/tốc độ phi mã
vocab.example: I’ve always had a soft spot for Italian supercars because they can go like the wind on an open highway.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với mục đích sử dụng
vocab.example: For city living, a compact car is perfectly fit for purpose as it makes finding a parking spot incredibly easy.

vocab.meaning: trong tình trạng hoàn hảo/gọn gàng sạch sẽ
vocab.example: I really like vintage cars, provided they have been well-maintained and are still in shipshape condition.
I tend to avoid heavy SUVs because I don't want to be stuck with a gas guzzler that costs a fortune to run.
